name_en: Top-tier original sample, code-changed chip M13796 Pink
name_cn:
Top-tier original sample, code-changed chip M13796 Pink
M12145 White M12144 Black M12211 Blue
This Nano Madeleine is crafted from Monogram Empreinte leather, returning to the new season with a sophisticated two-tone look. The neat interior includes a patch pocket and card slots, adding functional design to the compact structure. A glossy S-Lock clasp and a removable chain strap mark the brand identity.
12.5 x 6 x 21 cm
(Height x Width x Length)
Textured grainy calfskin
Calfskin trim
Fabric lining
Metal hardware
Patch pocket with card slots
Main accordion compartment
S-Lock clasp
Fits 6.7-inch smartphone, Lou wallet, keys, and headphones
Chain: Z06
Chain half-length: 55.0 cm
Handle: Single handle
